Organization 
Overview 
The Office of Equal Employment Opportunity (OEEO) is part of CDC's Immediate Office of the Director.
OEEO Organizational Structure: 
Director 
Deputy Director 
Alternative Dispute Resolution 
Complaints and Adjudication
